Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant for vector search – 2-4 bit compression 83 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. Go on Embedded Systems and WebAssembly 110 upvotes, 15 comments
  3. The Hardest Document Extraction Problem in Insurance 15 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. DCJ11Hack+ – DEC PDP/11 based homebrew computer 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. A Taxonomy of Interiors 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Show HN: I built a frontpage for personal blogs 604 upvotes, 166 comments
  7. A Recipe for Steganogravy 129 upvotes, 29 comments
  8. Build your own Dial-up ISP with a Raspberry Pi 89 upvotes, 20 comments
  9. iNaturalist 291 upvotes, 87 comments
  10. What changes when you turn a Linux box into a router 60 upvotes, 13 comments
  11. Linux Running in a PDF (2025) 69 upvotes, 19 comments
  12. What Category Theory Teaches Us About DataFrames 173 upvotes, 60 comments
  13. April 2026 TLDR Setup for Ollama and Gemma 4 26B on a Mac mini 278 upvotes, 111 comments
  14. Artemis II crew take 'spectacular' image of Earth 341 upvotes, 143 comments
  15. SSH certificates: the better SSH experience 199 upvotes, 82 comments
  16. The house is a work of art: Frank Lloyd Wright 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. Firm boosts H.264 streaming license fees from $100k up to staggering $4.5M 120 upvotes, 51 comments
  18. Oracle Files H-1B Visa Petitions Amid Mass Layoffs 256 upvotes, 126 comments
  19. We replaced RAG with a virtual filesystem for our AI documentation assistant 184 upvotes, 87 comments
  20. Samsung Magician disk utility takes 18 steps and two reboots to uninstall 375 upvotes, 208 comments
  21. Show HN: TinyOS – A minimalist RTOS for Cortex-M written in C 26 upvotes, 8 comments
  22. ESP32-S31: Dual-Core RISC-V SoC with Wi-Fi 6, Bluetooth 5.4, and Advanced HMI 195 upvotes, 111 comments
  23. Async Python Is Secretly Deterministic 49 upvotes, 22 comments
  24. How to Make a Sliding, Self-Locking, and Predator-Proof Chicken Coop Door (2020) 57 upvotes, 27 comments
  25. Automatic Textbook Formalization 21 upvotes, 7 comments
  26. Iran Strikes Leave Amazon Availability Zones "Hard Down" in Bahrain and Dubai 62 upvotes, 33 comments
  27. Show HN: Ismcpdead.com – Live dashboard tracking MCP adoption and sentiment 18 upvotes, 13 comments
  28. Update on the eBay Scam 27 upvotes, 30 comments
  29. F-15E jet shot down over Iran 299 upvotes, 693 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 4 April 2026. Source here.
